name: Lendified Holdings Inc.
summary: Lendified Holdings Inc., through its subsidiaries, provides online lending services for small businesses and lending technology to financial institutions in North America. It operates in two segments, Lending and Software as a Service (SaaS). The Lending segment originates and retains loans as part of its loans receivable portfolio. The SaaS segment engages in the sale of subscriptions for use of its web-based software. The company offers business loans for refinancing, cash flow, inventory and sourcing, bill and supplier, payment, equipment, relocation and expansion, hiring and training, and advertising and promotion activities. It serves the retail, auto related, health and beauty, restaurant, construction, and various other industries. Lendified Holdings Inc. was founded in 2015 and is headquartered in Toronto, Canada.
